raw_consumer_statement:
XXXX. ** Made online hostel reservation XXXX XXXX XXXX. Charged {$210.00} ( converted from XXXX ) deposit on XXXX for 5 night stay. 


2. Same date XXXX, same amount {$210.00} fraud charge I did not make. I filed a dispute with citibank shown on my XXXX XXXX XXXX I withdrew dispute for this FRAUD charge because hostel issued a refund on XXXX, XXXXXXXX XXXX {$200.00} instead of {$210.00} ok by me. 

1. ** Continued I filed a SECOND different dispute on XXXX with XXXX because the hostel cancelled my hotel reservation without my knowledge ( I think because they got the inquiry from Citi ), and said they would refund the second {$210.00}. I was supposed to receive this 2nd credit by XXXX. I NEVER RECEIVED THE CREDIT. Email from hostel says they sent it to my card. Citi HAS NEVER ACKNOWLEDGED THIS 2nd dispute in writing .XXXX  phone rep sent in explaining this is a different, 2nd dispute. I called citi again, spoke to supervisor XXXX on XXXX explaining this is not the original fraud dispute, this is the 2nd one fail to receive my deposit back. I got another letter from citi since the dispute is closed, can not re-open ( this was for the 1st dispute, not second ) CITI HAS NEVER ACKNOWLEDGED 2ND DISPUTE AND KEEPS REFERRING TO FIRST RESOLVED ONE. THEN CLOSES IT. 

I SENT IN THE EMAIL PROOF FROM THE HOSTEL MANY TIMES SHOWING I WAS OWED {$210.00} fraud plus {$210.00} for my cancelled reservation. 

I am a XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX and asking for your help.
